Contact.friendsDesc: Friends we collaborate with, where you can find our products.
Contact.defaultDesc: We thrive on blurring the lines between formats — spanning everything from 3D digital installations to limited-run silver pieces and art toys. Got a wild idea for a project or a collab? Shoot us a message on Telegram. We're always down to meet new people.
